title: Tadehagi triquetrum
taxonomy: Tadehagi triquetrum is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a legume native to Asia, known for its delicate and fern-like foliage. The plant is a climber or a scrambler, and it is commonly found in wet areas, such as marshes and by rivers. The classification of Tadehagi triquetrum includes being a member of the subfamily Faboideae, and it is also known by its synonym, Desmodium trifidum. As a species, Tadehagi triquetrum is a part of the genus Tadehagi.
